user.title: Agent prompts
user.description: Configure voice/style prompts. Tool behavior comes from MCP SERVER INSTRUCTIONS at runtime; keep tool instructions as a short reminder only.

llm.title: LLM backend
llm.description: Configure the OpenAI-compatible chat model (e.g. llama.cpp).

mcp.title: MCP Proxy
mcp.description: Configure MCP Proxy for tools (Home Assistant, news, mail).

agent_settings.title: Agent settings
agent_settings.description: Configure agent loop behaviour and streaming.

error.llm_connect_failed: Cannot connect to the LLM server.
error.mcp_connect_failed: Cannot connect to the MCP Proxy.

init.title: Change LLM model
init.description: Pick a model from your LLM server without re-running the full setup.
